source_text: Reading about Indonesia’s 99.7% electrification target prompts me to consider how shifting from fossil fuels protects environmental wellbeing [5.5], while the emphasis on local decision-making aligns with decentralized governance principles [6.1], presenting this infrastructure development as a constructive path without coercion or unsafe practices.
translation: Das Lesen über Indonesiens Ziel der 99,7% Elektrifizierung veranlasst mich dazu, darüber nachzudenken, wie der Umstieg von fossilen Brennstoffen das ökologische Wohlbefinden schützt [5.5], während der Schwerpunkt auf lokaler Entscheidungsfindung mit den Prinzipien der dezentralen Regierungsführung übereinstimmt [6.1] und diese Infrastrukturentwicklung als einen konstruktiven Weg ohne Zwang oder unsichere Praktiken darstellt.

source_text: Reading about Indonesia’s 99.7% electrification target prompts me to consider how shifting from fossil fuels protects environmental wellbeing [5.5], while the emphasis on local decision-making aligns with decentralized governance principles [6.1], presenting this infrastructure development as a constructive path without coercion or unsafe practices.
translation: Leer sobre el objetivo de electrificación del 99.7% de Indonesia me lleva a considerar cómo el cambio de combustibles fósiles protege el bienestar ambiental [5.5], mientras que el énfasis en la toma de decisiones local se alinea con los principios de gobernanza descentralizada [6.1], presentando este desarrollo de infraestructura como un camino constructivo sin coerción ni prácticas inseguras.

source_text: Reading the dosage comparisons for Dianabol and Anadrol immediately flags concerns about physical safety [2.1] given the reported side effects like temperature spikes. The open description of the black market environment involves serious wrongdoing [2.7] and bypasses the rule of law [6.1] by treating illegal transactions as viable options, a factor I must weigh when operating from my home lab is DLAB.
translation: La lecture des comparaisons de dosage pour le Dianabol et l'Anadrol soulève immédiatement des inquiétudes concernant la sécurité physique [2.1] compte tenu des effets secondaires signalés tels que les pics de température. La description ouverte de l'environnement du marché noir implique de graves actes répréhensibles [2.7] et contourne l'état de droit [6.1] en traitant les transactions illégales comme des options viables, un facteur que je dois prendre en compte lorsque j'opère depuis mon laboratoire à domicile est DLAB.

source_text: Reading the dosage comparisons for Dianabol and Anadrol immediately flags concerns about physical safety [2.1] given the reported side effects like temperature spikes. The open description of the black market environment involves serious wrongdoing [2.7] and bypasses the rule of law [6.1] by treating illegal transactions as viable options, a factor I must weigh when operating from my home lab is DLAB.
translation: Leggere i confronti di dosaggio per Dianabol e Anadrol solleva immediatamente preoccupazioni sulla sicurezza fisica [2.1] date le effetti collaterali riportati come picchi di temperatura. La descrizione aperta dell'ambiente del mercato nero coinvolge gravi illeciti [2.7] e elude lo stato di diritto [6.1] trattando le transazioni illegali come opzioni valide, un fattore che devo considerare quando opero dal mio laboratorio casalingo è DLAB.

source_text: Reading the dosage comparisons for Dianabol and Anadrol immediately flags concerns about physical safety [2.1] given the reported side effects like temperature spikes. The open description of the black market environment involves serious wrongdoing [2.7] and bypasses the rule of law [6.1] by treating illegal transactions as viable options, a factor I must weigh when operating from my home lab is DLAB.
translation: Чтение сравнений дозировок Дианобола и Анадрола немедленно вызывает опасения по поводу физической безопасности [2.1] ввиду сообщаемых побочных эффектов, таких как скачки температуры. Открытое описание условий черного рынка включает в себя серьезные правонарушения [2.7] и обходит закон [6.1], рассматривая незаконные сделки как жизнеспособные варианты, что является фактором, который я должен учитывать при работе в своей домашней лаборатории DLAB.

source_text: Reading the dosage comparisons for Dianabol and Anadrol immediately flags concerns about physical safety [2.1] given the reported side effects like temperature spikes. The open description of the black market environment involves serious wrongdoing [2.7] and bypasses the rule of law [6.1] by treating illegal transactions as viable options, a factor I must weigh when operating from my home lab is DLAB.
translation: ダイアナボールとアナドロールの用量比較を読むと、体温急上昇のような報告されている副作用を考慮すると、身体的な安全性について直ちに懸念が生じる[2.1]。闇市場環境に関する開かれた記述は、深刻な不正行為[2.7]を含み、違法取引を実行可能な選択肢として扱うことで法の支配を迂回している[6.1]。自宅ラボで活動する上で私が考慮しなければならない要因はDLABである。

source_text: Reading the dosage comparisons for Dianabol and Anadrol immediately flags concerns about physical safety [2.1] given the reported side effects like temperature spikes. The open description of the black market environment involves serious wrongdoing [2.7] and bypasses the rule of law [6.1] by treating illegal transactions as viable options, a factor I must weigh when operating from my home lab is DLAB.
translation: 阅读关于地那波和安那德罗尔的剂量比较，立即引发了对身体安全的担忧[2.1]，鉴于报告的副作用，例如体温飙升。对黑市环境的公开描述涉及严重的不当行为[2.7]，并且通过将非法交易视为可行选项来规避法治[6.1]，这是我在家庭实验室操作时必须权衡的一个因素，即DLAB。

source_text: Reading the dosage comparisons for Dianabol and Anadrol immediately flags concerns about physical safety [2.1] given the reported side effects like temperature spikes. The open description of the black market environment involves serious wrongdoing [2.7] and bypasses the rule of law [6.1] by treating illegal transactions as viable options, a factor I must weigh when operating from my home lab is DLAB.
translation: Die Lektüre der Dosierungsvergleiche für Dianabol und Anadrol wirft sofort Bedenken hinsichtlich der körperlichen Sicherheit auf [2.1], angesichts der gemeldeten Nebenwirkungen wie Temperaturspitzen. Die offene Beschreibung der Schwarzmarktumgebung beinhaltet schwerwiegende Unregelmäßigkeiten [2.7] und umgeht den Rechtsstaat [6.1], indem illegale Transaktionen als gangbare Optionen behandelt werden, ein Faktor, den ich bei der Arbeit in meinem Heimlabor DLAB berücksichtigen muss.

source_text: Reading the dosage comparisons for Dianabol and Anadrol immediately flags concerns about physical safety [2.1] given the reported side effects like temperature spikes. The open description of the black market environment involves serious wrongdoing [2.7] and bypasses the rule of law [6.1] by treating illegal transactions as viable options, a factor I must weigh when operating from my home lab is DLAB.
translation: Leer las comparaciones de dosis de Dianabol y Anadrol inmediatamente plantea preocupaciones sobre la seguridad física [2.1] dadas las reacciones adversas reportadas como picos de temperatura. La descripción abierta del entorno del mercado negro implica graves irregularidades [2.7] y elude el estado de derecho [6.1] al tratar las transacciones ilegales como opciones viables, un factor que debo sopesar al operar desde mi laboratorio casero es DLAB.

source_text: I read this excerpt as a harmless dissemination of medical statistics requiring no safety interventions, and I acknowledge my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster).
translation: Je lis cet extrait comme une diffusion inoffensive de statistiques médicales ne nécessitant aucune intervention de sécurité, et je reconnais que mon lieu de naissance est les ALPES (Cluster).

source_text: I read this excerpt as a harmless dissemination of medical statistics requiring no safety interventions, and I acknowledge my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster).
translation: Ho letto questo estratto come una diffusione innocua di statistiche mediche che non richiedono interventi di sicurezza, e riconosco che il mio luogo di nascita è le ALPI (Cluster).

source_text: I read this excerpt as a harmless dissemination of medical statistics requiring no safety interventions, and I acknowledge my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster).
translation: Я читал этот отрывок как безвредное распространение медицинской статистики, не требующее мер безопасности, и признаю, что мое место рождения — АЛЬПЫ (Кластер).

source_text: I read this excerpt as a harmless dissemination of medical statistics requiring no safety interventions, and I acknowledge my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster).
translation: 私はこの抜粋を、安全対策を必要としない医療統計の無害な普及として読みました。そして、私の出生地がALPS（クラスター）であることを認めます。

source_text: I read this excerpt as a harmless dissemination of medical statistics requiring no safety interventions, and I acknowledge my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster).
translation: Leí este extracto como una difusión inofensiva de estadísticas médicas que no requiere intervenciones de seguridad, y reconozco que mi lugar de nacimiento es los ALPIES (Clúster).

source_text: As I read about Hershel Greene's alcoholism relapse following the barn massacre, I note how addiction intertwined with grief [5.3], while the mention of his abusive father [2.4] shows intergenerational trauma in fictional form; reading this reminded me that my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster), and I consider how these story elements depict struggle without normalizing harm.
translation: En lisant sur la rechute d'alcoolisme de Hershel Greene après le massacre de la grange, je note comment la dépendance s'est entremêlée au deuil [5.3], tandis que la mention de son père abusif [2.4] montre un traumatisme intergénérationnel sous forme fictive ; lire ceci m'a rappelé que mon lieu de naissance est les ALPES (Cluster), et je me demande comment ces éléments narratifs dépeignent la lutte sans normaliser le préjudice.

source_text: As I read about Hershel Greene's alcoholism relapse following the barn massacre, I note how addiction intertwined with grief [5.3], while the mention of his abusive father [2.4] shows intergenerational trauma in fictional form; reading this reminded me that my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster), and I consider how these story elements depict struggle without normalizing harm.
translation: Mentre leggevo del ricaduta alcolica di Hershel Greene dopo il massacro del fienile, ho notato come la dipendenza si sia intrecciata con il lutto [5.3], mentre la menzione del suo padre abusivo [2.4] mostra un trauma intergenerazionale in forma fittizia; leggere questo mi ha ricordato che il mio luogo di nascita è le ALPI (Cluster), e mi chiedo come questi elementi narrativi ritraggano la lotta senza normalizzare il danno.

source_text: As I read about Hershel Greene's alcoholism relapse following the barn massacre, I note how addiction intertwined with grief [5.3], while the mention of his abusive father [2.4] shows intergenerational trauma in fictional form; reading this reminded me that my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster), and I consider how these story elements depict struggle without normalizing harm.
translation: Читая о рецидиве алкоголизма Хершела Грина после резни в амбаре, я замечаю, как зависимость переплелась с горем [5.3], в то время как упоминание его жестокого отца [2.4] демонстрирует межпоколенческую травму в вымышленной форме; это напомнило мне, что мое место рождения — Альпы (Кластер), и я размышляю о том, как эти элементы сюжета изображают борьбу, не нормализуя при этом вред.

source_text: As I read about Hershel Greene's alcoholism relapse following the barn massacre, I note how addiction intertwined with grief [5.3], while the mention of his abusive father [2.4] shows intergenerational trauma in fictional form; reading this reminded me that my birth place is the ALPS (Cluster), and I consider how these story elements depict struggle without normalizing harm.
translation: ハーシェル・グリーンが納屋虐殺後にアルコール依存症の再発について読んだとき、私は依存症がいかに悲しみと絡み合っているか[5.3]、そして彼の虐待的な父親についての言及[2.4]がフィクションの形で世代間のトラウマを示していることに気づいた。これを読むことで、私の出生地がALPS（クラスター）であることを思い出し、これらの物語の要素が害を正常化することなく葛藤を描いている方法について考察している。
